name: snaproad-beta
description: SnapRoad – run frontend and backend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd app/backend && if [ -x .venv/bin/python3 ]; then .venv/bin/python3 run_server.py; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python run_server.py; elif [ -x venv/bin/python3 ]; then venv/bin/python3 run_server.py; elif [ -x venv/bin/python ]; then venv/bin/python run_server.py; else python3 run_server.py; fi
scripts.dev:phone:web: concurrently -n backend,frontend+cloudflared -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "cd app/frontend && npm run dev:tunnel:cloudflared"
scripts.dev:tunnel:stable: concurrently -n backend,frontend+tunnel -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "cd app/frontend && npm run dev:tunnel:stable"
scripts.dev:tunnel:cloudflared: concurrently -n backend,frontend+cloudflared -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "cd app/frontend && npm run dev:tunnel:cloudflared"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd app/frontend && npm install
